# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1beta1
kind: Elasticsearch
metadata:
  name: example-elasticsearch
spec:
  version: 7.10.0
  nodeSets:
  - name: default
    count: 3
    config:
      node.master: true
      node.data: true
      xpack.security.enabled: false
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "4Gi"
        cpu: "500m"
      limits:
        memory: "8Gi"
        cpu: "1"
---
apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1beta1
kind: SnapshotRepository
metadata:
  name: example-snapshot-repository
spec:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: my-elasticsearch-backups
    endpoint: https://s3.amazonaws.com
    region: us-west-2
---
apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1beta1
kind: SnapshotLifecyclePolicy
metadata:
  name: example-snapshot-policy
spec:
  schedule: "0 0 * * *" # Daily at midnight
  settings:
    number_of_shards: 1
    index.lifecycle.name: "example-lifecycle-policy"
    index.lifecycle.rollover_alias: "my-index-alias"
